AMDGPUAlwaysInlinePass.cpp File Reference
#include "AMDGPU.h"
#include "llvm/IR/Module.h"
#include "llvm/Transforms/Utils/Cloning.h"
Include dependency graph for AMDGPUAlwaysInlinePass.cpp:

Go to the source code of this file.

Detailed Description

This pass marks all internal functions as always_inline and creates duplicates of all other functions a marks the duplicates as always_inline.

Definition in file AMDGPUAlwaysInlinePass.cpp.
